message:
Add aggregate-as-window functions: SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, MAX, TOTAL

Implement WindowSumFunc, WindowTotalFunc, WindowCountFunc,
WindowMinFunc, WindowMaxFunc, WindowAvgFunc. Each implements the
WindowFunction trait with step/inverse/value/finalize, enabling
aggregate functions in OVER() window clauses per SQLite spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
